rules.name: Cut Size
rules.explanation: Divide desired size by shrinkage factor.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Cotton typically shrinks 3-5% on first wash. Some fabrics shrink up to 10%.
Yes, always pre-wash to preshrink before cutting, especially for garments.
